allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/app/login.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; "Server OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Server error: $_" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/app/login.html" -UseBasicParsing; if \($r.Content -match 'demo-banner'\) { "login.html OK — demo banner found" } else { "login.html OK but demo-banner missing" }; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/app/firebase-config.js" -UseBasicParsing; if \($r2.Content -match 'isFirebaseConfigured'\) { "firebase-config.js OK" } else { "firebase-config.js MISSING" }; $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/app/auth.js" -UseBasicParsing; if \($r3.Content -match 'demoUsers'\) { "auth.js OK" } else { "auth.js MISSING" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/v1/accounts:signUp?key=AIzaSyA3LvaI3SUnnumEND0g3syPmlclDB1ZetQ" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test@test.com","password":"123456","returnSecureToken":true}' -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; try { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } catch { "Could not read error" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://firestore.googleapis.com/v1/projects/palcofy/databases/\(default\)/documents/users" -Method GET -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Firestore accessible: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; "Firestore response: $code — $\(if\($code -eq 403\){'Reglas bloqueando escritura'}elseif\($code -eq 404\){'Firestore no creado aún'}else{'Error desconocido'}\)" })
PowerShell($c = Get-Content "G:\\Mi unidad\\PALCOFY\\app\\pro.html" -Raw; $body = $c.Substring\($c.IndexOf\(''\), $c.IndexOf\('

PowerShell($c = Get-Content "G:\\Mi unidad\\PALCOFY\\app\\pro.html" -Raw; $start = $c.IndexOf\('<style>'\); $end = $c.IndexOf\('</style>'\); $css = $c.Substring\($start, $end - $start + 8\); $opens = \([regex]::Matches\($css, '\\{'\)\).Count; $closes = \([regex]::Matches\($css, '\\}'\)\).Count; "CSS braces: $opens open, $closes close \(diff: $\($opens - $closes\)\)")

PowerShell($c = Get-Content "G:\\Mi unidad\\PALCOFY\\app\\pro.html" -Raw; $start = $c.IndexOf\('<script type="module">'\); $js = $c.Substring\($start\); $opens = \([regex]::Matches\($js, '\\{'\)\).Count; $closes = \([regex]::Matches\($js, '\\}'\)\).Count; "JS braces: $opens open, $closes close \(diff: $\($opens - $closes\)\)")
